dailyQuote:
March 16, 2026
Hebrews 11 : 40  God having provided some better thing for us, that they without us should not be made perfect.

Comments  Brother Kevin Blewett, 2020-05-17

There is another commission. Amen? There was a commission when Jesus sent out to the cities in twos, ‘Preach the Gospel. Cast out devils. Heal the sick.’ That was the first commission. Amen? I’m going to leave you standing for a second. That’s right. Because, amen, the Holy Spirit likes to… to… have a response. Amen. Then His last commission, as He went up, amen, He said, it was Mark 16, ‘Go into all the world. Preach the Gospel.’ Amen. Telling them to get baptised. Commanding them to be baptised in the Name of the Lord Jesus Christ. Amen?

And I want to take Brother Coleman’s words here, which Brother Mayeur brought, from “A Perfect Faith For A Perfect Rapture”, Tulsa, 4th July 1986.And he said: The last words that fell from His lips [he’s quoting the Prophet] until He comes again with a Shout and the Voice of the Archangel.[So that commission goes right down to the Shout and the Voice of the Archangel.] You stay with this last commission until I descend from Heaven [says Brother Coleman] with a Shout, with the Voice of the Archangel, and then I will give you another commission. [After the Shout and the Voice has brought the day, the acceptable day right up to present tense. But then when it switches to Judgement, there’s another commission. Amen? Amen?]

And I commission you now with another commission. And that commission is that you will be formed into the Word image to bring on the Resurrection. It’s Resurrection time. Amen. Right in the hour of Judgement you can be made perfect. You can be the Holy Ghost. You prophesied it, you’ve been rebuked, reviled, mocked; now you shall become. The High Priest of your confession will now adopt you. He will step into you, and you will be what you said you are. Then they’ll know that Joseph Perfection said it. Not Kevin Blewett, not Mark Njoroge, not Matthew King; but Joseph Perfection said, ‘I am Holy Spirit.’ Glory, glory. Yes, sir! Amen, amen. Wonderful. I am Joseph Perfection. I am Holy Spirit. I AM THAT I AM. I am She. I am He. We are One. Amen, Sister Dorothy? At that day you shall know we are Holy Spirit. One God.  

(...) So last Sunday, Jesus was standing in Belgium. The same Jesus Thatstood on the Mount of Olives to give that last commission, gave anew commission last Sunday from the Prophet’s Message. Why? It’s inseason. Amen, Brother Marku. It’s in season now, so a Fivefold Ministry must speak it and create that season. They speak, God creates. And now you’re in it. And you feel you’re in it. Your Perfection is drawing nigh. Glory, glory. (...) So Brother Coleman gave us that commission out of the Prophet’s Message. He says: So Church, you have to come to Perfection in order to bring the Resurrection. [That’s what Brother Branham said. He’s just echoing him, and now we echo the Echo.] That is your commission from God. You are commissioned from God to be formed to the Word image to bring on the Resurrection. Yah. Glory to God. Believest thou this? Brother Coleman, we believe. Amen.
services: Sunday: 9:00 AM | Wednesday: 4:30 PM | Friday: 4:30 PM
